blended.narrative: Ski Wentworth is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 17 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 50°F.
Saturday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 7" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
